name: Billionton Systems Inc.
summary: Billionton Systems Inc. manufactures and sells wireless and communication products. It offers smart film/PET products; RFID products; USB hub and network cards; memory cards; wireless LAN and Ethernet products; USB hub Ethernet adapters, cables, and rechargers; and multimedia products, such as Bluetooth headphones, speakers, and modules. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.
